content:
✅ Approved the contribution.
Comment: This puzzle is very good, I like it, even if it already failed on Clash of Code, but changing it to a Classic Puzzle is a good idea. Well-done!

✅ Approved the contribution.
Comment: I really like these kinds of little puzzles; the description is clear and well-illustrated, you quickly understand the problem to solve and what you have to do 👌
I found it really fun 😄

✅ Approved the contribution.
Comment: The puzzle is fun, and the examples are spot-on! (And I still think it's much better suited to a puzzle than a COC) :) Gratz!

Previously a clash of code: https://www.codingame.com/contribute/view/143763a2c780ba80ad45551fe6ae046187ee86
Appreciate your feedback! :)
